meta.title: Gamification - Konectr
meta.description: Discover how Konectr rewards real-world connections with tiers, badges, streaks, and daily rewards. Level up your social life.

header.title: Level Up Your Social Life
header.subtitle: Every real connection earns rewards. Climb tiers, collect badges, and unlock perks.

tiers.title: Your Journey, Six Tiers
tiers.subtitle: From your first activity to legendary status — every meetup moves you forward

badges.title: Collect Badges
badges.subtitle: 9 categories of achievements that celebrate how you connect

streaks.title: Keep the Flame Alive
streaks.subtitle: Stay active week after week and watch your streak grow
streaks.shieldDescription: Life happens. Streak Shields protect your streak if you miss a week — earned through consistent activity.

dailyRewards.title: Daily Rewards
dailyRewards.subtitle: Check in daily for 30 days to unlock escalating XP bonuses
dailyRewards.cycleNote: The cycle resets after Day 30 — start again with boosted base rewards

xp.title: Earn XP Everywhere
xp.subtitle: Six ways to earn experience points — from creating activities to maintaining streaks
xp.multiplierDescription: Your streak boosts all XP earned. Start at 1.0x and climb to 2.0x at 30+ days. The longer your streak, the faster you level up.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join Konectr and turn every real-world connection into progress.
